title: SQL/XML: implementation of and test for xmlcomment() broken?
poc:
select 
   xmlelement(name "Customer",
   xmlattributes(c.CustId as "id"),
   xmlcomment('simple comment test'))
 from Customers c;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Customers (CustId int PRIMARY KEY, Name varchar(100), Balance decimal(10, 2), CreatedAt timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO Customers (CustId, Name, Balance) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 1000.00);
INSERT INTO Customers (CustId, Name, Balance) VALUES (2, 'Jane Smith', NULL);
SELECT xmlelement(name 'Customer', xmlattributes(c.CustId as 'id', c.Name as 'name'), xmlcomment('Customer record for ' || COALESCE(c.Name, 'Unknown'))) FROM Customers c;
SELECT xmlelement(name 'Customer', xmlattributes(c.CustId as 'id'), xmlcomment('Balance is ' || COALESCE(c.Balance::text, 'not available'))) FROM Customers c WHERE c.Balance IS NOT NULL;
